query_title: The Librarian: Quest for the Spear

recommendations.title: Céline and Julie Go Boating
recommendations.overview: Julie, a daydreaming librarian, meets Céline, an enigmatic magician, and together they become the heroines of a time-warping adventure involving a haunted house, psychotropic candy, and a murder-mystery melodrama.

recommendations.title: Dungeons & Dragons: Wrath of the Dragon God
recommendations.overview: Due to a curse from his former master Profion, Damodar survived his death by Ridley Freeborn as an undead entity in pursuit of an evil artifact for some hundred years, so that he might be capable of unleashing unstoppable destruction on Izmir and the

recommendations.title: Kaamelott: The First Chapter
recommendations.overview: Hidden in Rome, King Arthur is planning his return to oppose the army of his former friend Lancelot.

recommendations.title: The Fantastic Flying Books of Mr. Morris Lessmore
recommendations.overview: After a hurricane levels his city, a young man wanders into a mysterious library where books literally come to life. This film won the Oscar for Best Animated Short Film in 2012.

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A group of misfits encounter a young Yeti named Everest, and they set off to reunite the magical creature with his family on the mountain of his namesake.

recommendations.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League
recommendations.overview: Determined to ensure Superman's ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne aligns forces with Diana Prince with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions.

recommendations.title: The Secret of Arkandias
recommendations.overview: Theo, not the most popular boy at his school, dreams of escaping the dreary everyday life, experiencing adventure and accomplishing great heroic deeds. His dream seems to be fulfilled when, one day, he finds a very old and magical book in the library

recommendations.title: Godzilla: Tokyo S.O.S.
recommendations.overview: Mothra and her fairies return to Japan to warn mankind that they must return Kiryu to the sea, for the dead must not be disturbed. However Godzilla has survived to menace Japan leaving Kiryu as the nation's only defense.

recommendations.title: Family Pack
recommendations.overview: When an old card game comes to life, a family jumps back in time to a medieval village where they must unmask werewolves to secure their return home.

recommendations.title: Black Clover: Sword of the Wizard King
recommendations.overview: As a lionhearted boy who can't wield magic strives for the title of Wizard King, four banished Wizard Kings of yore return to crush the Clover Kingdom.
